# GodeX

> Make every model a Codex engine through an OpenAI-compatible Responses API gateway. GodeX translates OpenAI Responses API requests into any provider's Chat Completions API, enabling tools like Codex, Cursor, and Windsurf to use DeepSeek, Zhipu, and any OpenAI-compatible provider.

## Onboarding

- [Contributor Guide](wiki/onboarding/contributor/contributor-guide.md) — For new contributors with TypeScript proficiency
- [Staff Engineer Guide](wiki/onboarding/staff-engineer/staff-engineer-guide.md) — Dense architectural guide for senior engineers
- [Executive Guide](wiki/onboarding/executive/executive-guide.md) — For VP/director-level engineering leaders
- [Product Manager Guide](wiki/onboarding/product-manager/product-manager-guide.md) — For PMs and non-engineering stakeholders

## Getting Started

- [Overview](wiki/01-getting-started/overview.md) — What GodeX is, why it exists, core value proposition
- [Quick Start](wiki/01-getting-started/quick-start.md) — Install, configure, and run in 5 minutes
- [CLI Reference](wiki/01-getting-started/cli-reference.md) — All commands, flags, and environment variables

## Deep Dive

- [Architecture](wiki/02-architecture/architecture.md) — System layers, request flow, and module responsibilities
- [Bridge Kernel](wiki/03-bridge-kernel/bridge-kernel.md) — The Responses-to-Chat translation core
- [Provider Development](wiki/04-provider-development/provider-development.md) — How to add a new LLM provider
- [Streaming Pipeline](wiki/05-streaming-pipeline/streaming-pipeline.md) — Transform chain and stream state machine
- [Session Management](wiki/06-session-management/session-management.md) — Conversation chains and session stores
- [Configuration](wiki/07-configuration/configuration.md) — godex.yaml schema, env interpolation, defaults
- [Trace & Observability](wiki/08-trace-observability/trace-observability.md) — Async SQLite tracing system
- [Error Handling](wiki/09-error-handling/error-handling.md) — GodeXError hierarchy and domain codes
